flashcards.definition: A function or equation that describes a real-world phenomenon.
Statistical technique to find the best-fit curve for data (linear, quadratic, exponential, etc.).
Choose the function type based on data shape: linear (constant rate), quadratic (parabolic), exponential (growth/decay), trig (periodic).
Compare predicted vs actual values to assess model quality.
Models may not be reliable far beyond the range of data used to build them.
